meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Pricing to Solve Can't Finish Projects
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on client work. Learn how strategic SaaS pricing and AI-driven workflows using Antigravity and Claude Code help you ship profitable projects fast.
content.answer_block: To stop the cycle of unfinished projects, move from hourly billing to value-based SaaS pricing. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative development, you create a repeatable, high-margin system that keeps clients happy and ensures you ship a functional MVP within days, not months.
content.intro:
The cursor blinks on a half-finished dashboard. You have three clients, two unfinished repositories, and a creeping sense of imposter syndrome that hits every time you open VS Code. You aren't failing because you lack skill; you are failing because your pricing model forces you into an infinite loop of feature creep and scope bloat.

Professional shipping isn't about code perfection—it's about architecture and execution velocity. By shifting your pricing structure and automating the boilerplate, you reclaim your agency. Here is how to stop the cycle and turn your development process into a high-velocity, profitable machine.

steps.title: Define the Value-Based Price Tier
steps.description: Stop charging for time. Define a fixed-price package based on the business problem solved. This prevents scope creep by strictly defining the MVP deliverables.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a pricing calculator component for a SaaS dashboard that displays three tiers: Starter, Pro, and Enterprise, focused on value metrics rather than feature counts.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a pricing component with Tailwind CSS based on the defined value-based tiers'

steps.title: Scaffold the Core Architecture
steps.description: Use AI to lay the foundation immediately. Eliminate the 'blank page' syndrome by generating the entire directory structure in one go.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Next.js 14 project with Tailwind, Prisma, and NextAuth. Include a standard folder structure for an SaaS application.

steps.title: Implement the Stripe Integration
steps.description: Payment friction is the number one reason freelancers abandon projects. Get the billing logic set up before building the UI.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust Stripe webhook handler for subscription creation and cancellation in a Next.js API route.

steps.title: Rapid Iteration with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to handle the 'boring' CRUD operations while you focus on the business logic and client communication.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current database schema to support multi-tenancy in the SaaS pricing model.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor database schema for multi-tenancy support'

steps.title: Automate Deployment Pipelines
steps.description: Don't manually deploy. Set up an automated pipeline that deploys on every push so you can show progress to clients instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Vercel deployment configuration file that includes automatic environment variable injection for production.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'setup vercel.json with production environment safety checks'

pro_tips: Always bill 50% upfront; this creates immediate psychological commitment for both you and the client.
Use a 'Feature Freeze' clause in your contract to prevent scope creep after the initial requirements are signed.
Leverage Claude Code's memory by keeping a 'context.md' file in your root directory to track project decisions.
Build a 'Private Beta' page early; having a URL to share with a client kills the 'we aren't making progress' anxiety.
Standardize your tech stack across all clients to ensure you aren't learning new frameworks for every single project.
content.next_steps: After completing this workflow, document your component library to reuse these modules in your next client project to increase your profit margins by 30%.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting unfinished projects drain your revenue and your confidence. By mastering the intersection of AI tools and strategic pricing, you can ship faster than any solo dev in your niche. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
